revision.text:
<noinclude>This page lists templates which can be used to list [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Bundling citations|multiple citations inside a single reference]].
== Explicitly for use with references ==</noinclude> {{see|Help:Citation merging}} * [[Template:Sfnm]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons * [[Template:Sfnmp]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons, with dates in parentheses * [[Template:Unbulleted list citebundle]] (Shortcut: {{t|multiref}}) – citations are indented in an unbulleted list * [[Template:Multiref2]] – citations are separated with additional white space
The {{tl|harvnb}} and {{tl|r}} or other similar templates can be manually bundled in a single footnote
<small>General templates that create lists not necessarily designed for references or footnotes can be found at [[:Category:List formatting and function templates]].</small> {{Wikipedia referencing}} <noinclude>{{Template disambiguation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<noinclude>This page lists templates which can be used to list [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Bundling citations|multiple citations inside a single reference]].
== Explicitly for use with references ==</noinclude> {{see|Help:Citation merging}} * [[Template:Sfnm]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons * [[Template:Sfnmp]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons, with dates in parentheses * [[Template:Unbulleted list citebundle]] (Shortcut: {{t|multiref}}) – citations are indented in an unbulleted list * [[:en:Template:Multiref2|Template:Multiref2]] – citations are separated with additional white space
The {{tl|harvnb}} and {{tl|r}} or other similar templates can be manually bundled in a single footnote
<small>General templates that create lists not necessarily designed for references or footnotes can be found at [[:Category:List formatting and function templates]].</small> {{Wikipedia referencing}} <noinclude>{{Template disambiguation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>This page lists templates which can be used to list [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Bundling citations|multiple citations inside a single reference]].
== Explicitly for use with references ==</noinclude> {{see|Help:Citation merging}} * [[Template:Sfnm]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons * [[Template:Sfnmp]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons, with dates in parentheses * [[Template:Unbulleted list citebundle]] (Shortcut: {{t|multiref}}) – citations are indented in an unbulleted list * [[:en:Template:Multiref2|Template:Multiref2]] – citations are separated with additional white space
The {{tl|harvnb}} and {{tl|r}} or other similar templates can be manually bundled in a single footnote
<small>General templates that create lists not necessarily designed for references or footnotes can be found at [[:Category:List formatting and function templates]].</small> {{Wikipedia referencing}} <noinclude>{{Template disambiguation}}</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>This page lists templates which can be used to list [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Bundling citations|multiple citations inside a single reference]].
== Explicitly for use with references ==</noinclude> {{see|Help:Citation merging}} * [[Template:Sfnm]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons * [[Template:Sfnmp]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons, with dates in parentheses * [[Template:Unbulleted list citebundle]] (Shortcut: {{t|multiref}}) – citations are indented in an unbulleted list * [[:en:Template:Multiref2|Template:Multiref2]] – citations are separated with additional white space
The {{tl|harvnb}} and {{tl|r}} or other similar templates can be manually bundled in a single footnote
<small>General templates that create lists not necessarily designed for references or footnotes can be found at [[:Category:List formatting and function templates]].</small> {{Wikipedia referencing}} <noinclude>{{Template disambiguation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>This page lists templates which can be used to list [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Bundling citations|multiple citations inside a single reference]].
== Explicitly for use with references ==</noinclude> {{see|Help:Citation merging}} * [[Template:Sfnm]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons * [[Template:Sfnmp]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons, with dates in parentheses * [[Template:Unbulleted list citebundle]] (Shortcut: {{t|multiref}}) – citations are indented in an unbulleted list * [[:en:Template:Multiref2|Template:Multiref2]] – citations are separated with additional white space
The {{tl|harvnb}} and {{tl|r}} or other similar templates can be manually bundled in a single footnote
<small>General templates that create lists not necessarily designed for references or footnotes can be found at [[:Category:List formatting and function templates]].</small> {{Wikipedia referencing}} <noinclude>{{Template disambiguation}}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

<noinclude>This page lists templates which can be used to list [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Bundling citations|multiple citations inside a single reference]].
== Explicitly for use with references ==</noinclude> {{see|Help:Citation merging}} * [[Template:Sfnm]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons * [[Template:Sfnmp]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons, with dates in parentheses * [[Template:Unbulleted list citebundle]] (Shortcut: {{t|multiref}}) – citations are indented in an unbulleted list * [[:en:Template:Multiref2|Template:Multiref2]] – citations are separated with additional white space
The {{tl|harvnb}} and {{tl|r}} or other similar templates can be manually bundled in a single footnote
<small>General templates that create lists not necessarily designed for references or footnotes can be found at [[:Category:List formatting and function templates]].</small> {{Wikipedia referencing}} <noinclude>{{Template disambiguation}}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:reimport]]

<noinclude>This page lists templates which can be used to list [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Bundling citations|multiple citations inside a single reference]].
== Explicitly for use with references ==</noinclude> {{see|Help:Citation merging}} * [[Template:Sfnm]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons * [[Template:Sfnmp]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons, with dates in parentheses * [[Template:Unbulleted list citebundle]] (Shortcut: {{t|multiref}}) – citations are indented in an unbulleted list * [[Template:Multiref2]] – citations are separated with additional white space, in an unbulleted list without indentation
The {{tl|harvnb}} and {{tl|r}} or other similar templates can be manually bundled in a single footnote
<small>General templates that create lists not necessarily designed for references or footnotes can be found at [[:Category:List formatting and function templates]].</small> {{Wikipedia referencing}} <noinclude>{{Template disambiguation}}</noinclude>

<noinclude>This page lists templates which can be used to list [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Bundling citations|multiple citations inside a single reference]].
== Explicitly for use with references ==</noinclude> {{see|Help:Citation merging}} * [[Template:Sfnm]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons * [[Template:Sfnmp]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons, with dates in parentheses * [[Template:Unbulleted list citebundle]] (Shortcut: {{t|multiref}}) – citations are indented in an unbulleted list * [[Template:Multiref2]] – citations are separated with additional white space, in an unbulleted list without indentation
The {{tl|harvnb}} and {{tl|r}} or other similar templates can be manually bundled in a single footnote
<small>General templates that create lists not necessarily designed for references or footnotes can be found at [[:Category:List formatting and function templates]].</small> {{Wikipedia referencing}} <noinclude>{{Template disambiguation}}</noinclude>

<noinclude>This page lists templates which can be used to list [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Bundling citations|multiple citations inside a single reference]].
== Explicitly for use with references ==</noinclude> {{see|Help:Citation merging}} * [[Template:Sfnm]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons * [[Template:Sfnmp]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons, with dates in parentheses * [[Template:Unbulleted list citebundle]] (Shortcut: {{t|multiref}}) – citations are indented in an unbulleted list * [[Template:Multiref2]] – citations are separated with additional white space, in an unbulleted list without indentation
The {{tl|harvnb}} and {{tl|r}} or other similar templates can be manually bundled in a single footnote
<small>General templates that create lists not necessarily designed for references or footnotes can be found at [[:Category:List formatting and function templates]].</small> {{Wikipedia referencing}} <noinclude>{{Template disambiguation}}</noinclude>

<noinclude>This page lists templates which can be used to list [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Bundling citations|multiple citations inside a single reference]].
== Explicitly for use with references ==</noinclude> {{see|Help:Citation merging}} * [[Template:Sfnm]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons * [[Template:Sfnmp]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons, with dates in parentheses * [[Template:Unbulleted list citebundle]] (Shortcut: {{t|multiref}}) – citations are indented in an unbulleted list * [[Template:Multiref2]] – citations are separated with additional white space, in an unbulleted list without indentation
The {{tl|harvnb}} and {{tl|r}} or other similar templates can be manually bundled in a single footnote
<small>General templates that create lists not necessarily designed for references or footnotes can be found at [[:Category:List formatting and function templates]].</small> {{Wikipedia referencing}} <noinclude>{{Template disambiguation}}</noinclude>

<noinclude>This page lists templates which can be used to list [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Bundling citations|multiple citations inside a single reference]].
== Explicitly for use with references ==</noinclude> {{see|Help:Citation merging}} * [[Template:Sfnm]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons * [[Template:Sfnmp]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons, with dates in parentheses * [[Template:Unbulleted list citebundle]] (Shortcut: {{t|multiref}}) – citations are indented in an unbulleted list * [[Template:Multiref2]] – citations are separated with additional white space, in an unbulleted list without indentation
The {{tl|harvnb}} and {{tl|r}} or other similar templates can be manually bundled in a single footnote
<small>General templates that create lists not necessarily designed for references or footnotes can be found at [[:Category:List formatting and function templates]].</small> {{Wikipedia referencing}} <noinclude>{{Template disambiguation}}</noinclude>

<noinclude>This page lists templates which can be used to list [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Bundling citations|multiple citations inside a single reference]].
== Explicitly for use with references ==</noinclude> {{see|Help:Citation merging}} * [[Template:Sfnm]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons * [[Template:Sfnmp]] – creates a series of shortened footnotes separated by semicolons, with dates in parentheses * [[Template:Unbulleted list citebundle]] (Shortcut: {{t|multiref}}) – citations are indented in an unbulleted list * [[Template:Multiref2]] – citations are separated with additional white space, in an unbulleted list without indentation
The {{tl|harvnb}} and {{tl|r}} or other similar templates can be manually bundled in a single footnote
<small>General templates that create lists not necessarily designed for references or footnotes can be found at [[:Category:List formatting and function templates]].</small> {{Wikipedia referencing}} <noinclude>{{Template disambiguation}}</noinclude>
